analysis_commentary: Run interrupted via SIGUSR1 at ~3h elapsed. Symmetric ratio fix had not yet been built; train_rate had slid 3.7M → 1.2M pos/hr over the session and replay ratio settled at ~0.27 vs target=1.10. User-directed kill so the new build (commit 187e86c symmetric controller) could be tested. No promotion across 35 arenas. Manual reject: not a real proposer iteration.
